summary: Gruber announces a special live episode of The Talk Show podcast being recorded at Macworld Expo's podcast booth. His regular co-host Dan Benjamin couldn't attend, so Cabel Sasser of Panic will join instead. Unlike the previous year's live recording, there's no audience seating, though audio will be broadcast for spectators. He deliberately gave short notice to avoid overcrowding a standing-room situation.
key_points: A live episode of The Talk Show is being recorded at Macworld Expo's podcast booth
Cabel Sasser replaces regular co-host Dan Benjamin for this special episode
Unlike the previous year's Macworld recording, there is no audience seating arrangement
Gruber intentionally avoided promoting the event in advance due to the lack of seating
money_quotes: I thought it unwise to promote this in advance.
key_insight: A brief logistical announcement about a live Talk Show recording at Macworld Expo, notable mainly as an early example of Gruber's podcast taking shape as a community event.
